description_long: This skateboard features a wooden deck with a vibrant, cartoon-style graphic depicting a whimsical character in a blue jacket, yellow pants, and a large pink-and-white hat. The deck is rectangular with slightly upturned nose and tail, and the edges are beveled for a sleek look. The underside artwork is bold and colorful, with a mix of blue, yellow, pink, and white hues, and includes stylized text. The skateboard is equipped with four bright red wheels, which are attached to metal trucks that are partially visible from the side. The top of the deck appears smooth and lacks visible grip tape, suggesting a focus on the graphic design. This object is typical of skateboards used in urban environments for recreation and transportation.
description: A wooden skateboard with a colorful cartoon graphic on the deck, bright red wheels, and a rectangular shape with upturned ends. The deck features a whimsical character and bold colors, with no visible grip tape.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the skateboard, the upturned nose and tail, and the red wheels beneath the deck.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the width of the deck, the character's face and hat, and the two front wheels.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, showing the same upturned ends and the graphic from a reversed perspective.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the deck, the character's body, and the two rear wheels.
attribute_brand_logo: A stylized text logo in blue and yellow is present on the lower right side of the deck graphic, partially obscured by the character's hand.
attribute_deck_graphic_design: The deck features a large, colorful cartoon illustration of a character with a white face, pink-and-white striped tall hat, blue jacket, and yellow pants, holding a blue object. The style is playful and bold, with thick outlines and vibrant colors. There is also stylized blue and yellow text integrated into the design.
attribute_wheel_type: Classic skateboard wheels, medium size, solid bright red color, no visible text or logos.
attribute_truck_style: Standard skateboard trucks, metallic color, top-mounted beneath the deck, partially visible from the side, no visible branding.
